blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 22" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
